required_behavior: Map Protocol 775 Login clientbound packet id 0x04 to the existing LoginPluginRequest packet shape that preserves the official minecraft:custom_query mapping.
Decode the official body shape from the generated answer: transactionId VarInt, payload Identifier, then remaining payload body bytes.
Consume the full official body bytes for oracle/answers/775/login_custom_query_clientbound_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
Do not edit oracle answers or infer packet facts outside the generated official artifact.
stop_boundary: Implement only Protocol 775 Login clientbound minecraft:custom_query packet dispatch/body support needed for the exact oracle test. Do not implement cookie_request, plugin channel handling, custom query semantics, login acknowledgement behavior, Login-to-Configuration transition behavior, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or UI behavior.
